arts.ttl: Brentford vs Bournemouth preview: Kepa back, Sinisterra still missing
arts.sum: “In training today, he was a handful for the other team,” boss Thomas Frank said at a press conference. Thiago, who was brought in to replace Saudi Arabia-bound Ivan Toney in the Bees attack, is now back in training and will play in an in-house match next week.

arts.ttl: Bournemouth derby was 'really tough' Cherries' James

arts.ttl: Man United coach Darren Fletcher handed three-match ban and £7,500 fine for misconduct after furious half-time rant at officials in Brentford win
arts.sum: Man United coach Darren Fletcher has been handed a three-match ban and £7,500 fine for misconduct after his furious half-time rant at officials against Brentford last month.
